name: Benson Henderson
winProfile: 4 Elite+ wins, 5 Top-5+ wins, 10 ranked quality wins.
shortCase: Four UFC title-fight wins and an 11-3 UFC record in a loaded lightweight era, capped by low finish volume and three counted prime losses.
bestArgument: Henderson won the UFC lightweight title, defended it three times, beat Frankie Edgar twice, and went 11-3 across lightweight and welterweight.
counterArgument: Several signature decisions were close, he finished only two UFC wins, and the Pettis, dos Anjos, and Cerrone losses all sit inside the counted elite window. WEC is excluded.
whyRankedHere: Henderson won the UFC lightweight title, defended it three times, beat Frankie Edgar twice, and went 11-3 across lightweight and welterweight.
whyNotHigher: Several signature decisions were close, he finished only two UFC wins, and the Pettis, dos Anjos, and Cerrone losses all sit inside the counted elite window. WEC is excluded.
finalTakeaway: Four UFC title-fight wins and an 11-3 UFC record in a loaded lightweight era, capped by low finish volume and three counted prime losses.
